title: CSV, JSON Lines, Schemas, Stable Output, Redaction, and Accessible Reports
description: Columns reorder between runs, newlines corrupt CSV, None becomes ambiguous, JSON arrays cannot stream, secrets enter logs, and the visual report has no table semantics. Learners cumulatively produce versioned machine and accessible human report through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define UTF-8, newline handling, dialect, ordered fields, quoting, formula policy, missing values, limits, and atomic replacement.
Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.
Sort by documented semantic keys and stable tie-breakers so concurrency, retries, and resume do not change comparable output.
